title: pachypleuria intermarginalis
intro: Pachypleuria intermarginalis, also known as the Japanese spikenard, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pachypleuria intermarginalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Pachypleuria intermarginalis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
